message:
fix: make `agents --dry-run --json` produce distinct output with dry_run/would_action fields

The `execute_json()` function was ignoring the `args` parameter (prefixed
with underscore), so `--dry-run --json` produced output identical to plain
`--json`. Now when dry_run is set, the JSON includes `"dry_run": true` and
`"would_action"` fields consistent with `br upgrade --dry-run --json`.

Also trim whitespace from GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN env vars in
`resolve_auth_token()` so that whitespace-only values are treated as empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -246,6 +246,7 @@ fn resolve_auth_token() -> Option<String> {
     env::var("GITHUB_TOKEN")
         .or_else(|_| env::var("GH_TOKEN"))
         .ok()
+        .map(|t| t.trim().to_string())
         .filter(|t| !t.is_empty())
 }
